layer_change_gcode:
;AFTER_LAYER_CHANGE
_MMU_UPDATE_HEIGHT

; If you want enhanced pausing feature with Happy Hare client macros also add this
SET_PRINT_STATS_INFO CURRENT_LAYER={layer_num} ; For pause at layer functionality and better print stats
;[layer_z]
machine_start_gcode:
MMU_START_SETUP INITIAL_TOOL={initial_tool} REFERENCED_TOOLS=!referenced_tools! TOOL_COLORS=!colors! TOOL_TEMPS=!temperatures! TOOL_MATERIALS=!materials! FILAMENT_NAMES=!filament_names! PURGE_VOLUMES=!purge_volumes!
MMU_START_CHECK
M104 S0
M140 S0
print_start EXTRUDER=[first_layer_temperature] BED=[first_layer_bed_temperature] CHAMBER=[chamber_temperature]
MMU_START_LOAD_INITIAL_TOOL
SET_PRINT_STATS_INFO TOTAL_LAYER={total_layer_count} ; For pause at layer functionality and better print stats
name: Voron 2.4 350 0.4
